diff: The transfer of 10,000,000 USDS from the Surplus Buffer to the Skybase SubProxy for the Genesis Capital Allocation will be included in the January 29, 2026 Executive Vote.
This action is authorized to proceed directly to an Executive Vote without a prior Governance Poll.
